---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the public overlay package
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the requested change.

## Problem

What limitation or friction does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the proposed behavior.

## Scope Impact

Does this affect:

- install output
- helper behavior
- overlay UI
- docs only

## Notes

If this may require bundling new assets, changing mount paths, or changing public compatibility promises, call that out explicitly.
